scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.api:ci: npm run format:check -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run docs:lint -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/api
scripts.web:ci: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/web
